title: Backports for v2.0.2
body: Bunch of backported bugfixes - last commit is release notes summary of the backports

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v2.0/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Should the Vendor PRs be done differently?
@rhatdan I don't think we want to do much revendoring into an LTS branch?
@mheon As long as we can continue to use the test suite, I am fine with it.
